content.en:
Ye Tian's battle with the Devouring Beast was over, but the Flower of Eternity was not affected, the Flower of Eternity had the power to protect itself, and Ye Tian deliberately avoided the place where the Flower of Eternity was.

Thus, the Flower of Eternity was not destroyed.

After the Devouring Beast recognized its master, Ye Tian asked the Devouring Beast to stay aside first.

Finally, the so-called great opportunity, he was not in a hurry to ask for the time being, and waited for the Qinghan Fairy to successfully obtain the Eternal Flower first.

A few days passed, and the Flower of Eternity finally bloomed completely.

After blooming, the Qinghan Fairy carefully picked the Flower of Eternity and immediately refined it on the spot.

Soon.

The Flower of Eternity has been thoroughly refined by the Qinghan Fairy, the skin is more delicate and tender, and the fairy aura is more intense, and the temperament of the whole person is more beautiful than before.

But the real effect of the Flower of Eternity is eternal rejuvenation, no matter how old the Qinghan Fairy is in the future, even if she reaches the limit of her lifespan, she will still maintain such beauty.

"It worked!"

The Qinghan Fairy was very surprised.

At this time, Ye Tian urged: "Qinghan Fairy, since you have refined the Flower of Eternity, it is time for us to collect the Purple Sandalwood Flower and the Golden Bone Leaf!"

"Okay, I happen to know a place where a lot of red sandalwood and golden bone leaves were born, but that place is very dangerous, so the god-level disciples of Danta only know that place, but few people dare to go there, there should be a lot of red sandalwood and golden bone leaves. "

Qinghan Fairy said.

"Alright, let's go there!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Under the leadership of the Qinghan Fairy, Ye Tian came to a place called Eight Finger Mountain in the Stygian Flower Realm.

Eight Finger Mountain is an area formed by the convergence of eight mountains, and these eight mountains are like the eight fingers of human beings, hence the name.

On the Eight Finger Mountain, there are many powerful true god-level creatures, and there is also an incomparably terrifying group - the Five Poisonous Royal Bees, the Five Poisonous Royal Bees are all true god-level creatures, and there are too many of them.

It is precisely because of the existence of the Five Poisonous Royal Bees that the people of Danta dare not enter here, for fear of being discovered by the Five Poisonous Royal Bees.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's strength being too strong, Fairy Qinghan wouldn't dare to suggest Ye Tian to come here.

At the foot of Eight Finger Mountain.

Ye Tian and the others stood here and did not rush in.

"Your Highness Wanfa, there are too many true god-level creatures here, let's be careful!"

Qinghan Fairy reminded.

"Well, I sensed that there are indeed a lot of true god-level creatures here, and I also smelled the aroma of red sandalwood, obviously there are a lot of red sandalwood here, if the red sandalwood and golden bone leaves here are taken away, it is estimated that there is no need to go anywhere else. "

Ye Tian muttered.

"You wait here, I'll enter alone, otherwise, there are too many true god-level creatures, and I may not have time to protect you. Ye Tian proposed.

"Good!"

Qinghan Fairy nodded, and also knew that the strength of the others was too weak, and they couldn't help Ye Tian at all, but they were a burden.

"Master, am I going to help too?"

The Devourer asked.

"Come in with me!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The strength of the Devouring Beast is not weak, so there should be no true god-level creature that can kill the Devouring Beast, and letting the Devouring Beast enter can solve the true god-level creature here faster.

Shout!

Ye Tian teleported in with the Devouring Beast, and as soon as he entered one of the mountains of the Eight Finger Mountain, the breath of a true god-level creature surged towards Ye Tian at an extremely fast speed.

"Roar, Roar, Roar, !!Roar, Roar, Roar, Roar, T

There were about dozens of true god-level creatures coming over, and they were basically true god-level creatures with ninth-order cultivation at the true god level.

"Die!"

Ye Tian unleashed the Chaos Palm, easily pinching the true god-level creatures to death.

Next, Ye Tian began to sweep through the mountains of true god-level creatures, and soon provoked the Five Poisonous Royal Bees.

Buzz Buzz !!!

In the void, the dense Five Poison Royal Bees are used, and there are about tens of thousands of them, and the cultivation of each one is also the lowest True God Level First Order, and there are many True God Level Nine Order Five Poison Royal Bees.

With so many five poisonous royal bees attacking together, even if it is a very powerful inheritance, it will be difficult to resist, and it will definitely be besieged to death.

"Master, I'll help you!"

The Devouring Beast took the initiative to ask for help, and immediately opened its huge mouth and cast its Devouring Magical Power.

Suddenly, one by one, the Five Poisonous Royal Bees were swallowed into the stomach by the Devouring Beast, but after only devouring a few hundred, the Devouring Beast reached its limit, and it was difficult to continue devouring it.

"Master, I can't do it!"

Devouring Beast hurriedly said.

His devouring divine power didn't dare to use it anymore, and with its cultivation, it would not be afraid to deal with any of the Five Poisonous Royal Bees, but if so many Five Poisonous Wasps besieged it, no matter how strong it was, it would be stabbed to death.

"Mixed Element Vine!"

"Mixed Element Scale Armor!"

"Void Spirit Golden Silk Magical Power!"

"Five Elements Divine Wheel!"

......

Ye Tian used all kinds of means, and unleashed several attacks within the range, killing a large number of five poisonous royal bees one by one.

I saw a large number of corpses of the five poisonous royal bees falling from the sky, almost everywhere.

Time passed little by little, and the number of the Five Poisonous Royal Bees became smaller and smaller, but Ye Tian's combat power did not weaken at all.

He possessed the Chaos Ancient Realm, and his strength would hardly be exhausted, so no matter how many Five Poison Royal Bees there were, they would only be killed by him one by one.

It didn't take long for the Five Poison Emperor Bee Clan to collapse, and they wanted to escape, but they were directly trapped by Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Heavy Realm, and then they were harvested one by one and completely killed.

After emptying the true god-level creatures of Eight Finger Mountain, Ye Tian let Fairy Qinghan and the others enter Eight Finger Mountain.

Fairy Qinghan and the others entered Bazhi Mountain and saw the corpses of true god-level creatures everywhere, and they were all stunned.

"So many true god-level creatures!"

The Qinghan Fairy was extremely surprised, if it was her, I am afraid that she would die as soon as she came in.

"Collect rosewood!"

Ye Tian said.

"Hmm!"

The Qinghan Fairy nodded.

Since there was no threat from true god-level creatures, it was extremely easy for Ye Tian, Qinghan Fairy and others to collect red sandalwood, and there were many red sandalwood flowers in Bazhi Mountain.

In less than a day, Ye Tian collected 8,726 rosewood flowers, and Qinghan Fairy and others also collected nearly 20,000 rosewood flowers.

At the same time, Ye Tian and the others also discovered three golden bone trees and harvested about 50,000 golden bone leaves.

That's all they get!

"Your Highness Wanfa, we only need one-tenth of these red sandalwood flowers and golden bone leaves, and we will give you the rest!"

The Qinghan Fairy proposed.

"Thank you very much!"

Ye Tian didn't pretend to be false, he really needed the Purple Sandalwood Flower and the Golden Bone Tree Leaves, so that he could get some more Immortal Golden Pills.

Anyway, these red sandalwood flowers and golden bone leaves will be given to Danta, and the Qinghan Fairy is just losing some of Danta's rewards, and as her father, she has no shortage of these rewards at all.

After assigning the red sandalwood and the golden bone leaves, Ye Tian personally sent the Qinghan Fairy and the others out of the Stygian Flower Realm, after all, he still had his own things to do, and there was no way to protect the Qinghan Fairy in the future.

And the Qinghan Fairy has also completed her task, so there is no need to stay in the Stygian Flower Realm.

-------------

Returning to the original Stygian Flower Realm to enter the passage, Ye Tian was relieved after watching the Qinghan Fairy and her god-level guards all go out of the spatial passage.

"Devouring beast, what is the big chance you are talking about, tell me!"

Ye Tian turned his head and asked the Devouring Beast.
